title: Suggestions for Evangelion related Christmas presents
display_title: Suggestions for Evangelion related Christmas presents
wikitext:
[]: Suggestions for Evangelion-related Christmas presents             Quote Post by mechashiva » Thu Nov 20, 2014 2:39 pm So Christmas season is coming up and I'm putting together a list of stuff for my parents to get and since I'm guessing they're not observant enough to notice my sudden and inexplicable Evangelion love, given I don't spend much of the time around them talking about it, I want to put something Evangelion-related on the list, given that apparently the original show isn't on DVD yet or its out of print. So I figured I'd ask for suggestions. My Mom's more savvy with online shopping but she only really knows about Amazon so there's that to bear in mind but its from an online store, I can give her the link to it. Also it can't be too expensive. She's shopping for both me and my brother (at least she didn't do what she did last year and just buy all the stuff with one week's paycheck but spaced it out a little) so maybe not a EVA model if its more than 100 dollars.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Nov 20, 2014 4:03 pm What exactly did you have in mind for yourself? Manga? Merch? Anime (NGE or NTE/Rebuild) stuff?

[]:             Quote Post by mechashiva » Fri Nov 21, 2014 1:58 pm I'm not sure. I don't have much room on my bookshelf unless I speed read and get rid of some of the paranormal romances I borrowed from my Mom's friend from work on the pretense of reviewing them. So if its something like an art book, I may not have the room for it but maybe manga? I heard the Sadamoto manga was pretty good Are the Rebuild movies out on DVD?

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Fri Nov 21, 2014 2:10 pm how about a Dildo-shaped USB-thingy? -  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by mechashiva » Fri Nov 21, 2014 2:27 pm I already have more flash drives than I know what to do with

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Fri Nov 21, 2014 3:02 pm mechashiva wrote: Are the Rebuild movies out on DVD?

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Nov 21, 2014 3:52 pm mechashiva wrote: I already have more flash drives than I know what to do with

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Nov 21, 2014 4:51 pm Sadamoto's Evangelion manga would make fine presents, I think. They're around $14 a piece, but it doesn't get much cheaper than that when it comes to media content-- and now that I think of that, it's also less expensive than figmas.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Nov 21, 2014 5:29 pm You could also go the 3-in-1 route for the manga, too: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/13039/MANGA-NGE-manga-re-released-in-3-1-Omnibus-by-Viz/ How was that already back in 2012?! What the... Rebuild is out on both Bluray and DVD, yep. We're still waiting for 3.33 to be released stateside though: http://svenge.pcriot.com/evasite/usrebuild/usrebuild.htm (Main site for left pane: http://svenge.pcriot.com/ )

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Nov 21, 2014 7:06 pm I own all three omnibuses and I think they were fantastic purchases. All I have to wait for now is volume 14! And the holidays are coming up, so I may take my own advice and ask for it.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Nov 21, 2014 9:40 pm Or to keep it simple - Ask for gift certs from Righstuf, Amazon, or your online or brick and mortar purveyor of choice for Eva merch and go from there.
